nodes.label: AI as supplemental tool
nodes.grounding_span: I dont need ideas as much as I need something to execute the ideas I have

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it usually takes a couple times before I feel like Gemini understands what I want

nodes.label: AI as practical labor-saving tool
nodes.grounding_span: the AI integration never seems to be the labor saving device that I am envisioning

nodes.label: AI memory reliability in long conversations
nodes.grounding_span: the conversational AI serving as a mediator to take my needs and translate them to an AI that can execute them

nodes.label: Maintaining obsolete skills vs adapting to new AI-driven roles
nodes.grounding_span: I think its important to maintain the underlying principles

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: save me time trying to figure out how to create the spreadsheet I need

nodes.label: Creative and strategic human expertise
nodes.grounding_span: allow me to do what I do best, executive and creative decision making

nodes.label: Societal benefit and quality of life
nodes.grounding_span: increase quality of life for the majority of people rather than decrease it

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's failure to deliver seamless execution
nodes.grounding_span: I never find it as intuitive or as 'point and click' as I am expecting

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I think AI has great potential within the workplace specifically for smaller or independent businesses

nodes.label: Concern about job displacement
nodes.grounding_span: automation and specifically AI does threaten many jobs

nodes.label: Analogical reasoning — uses concrete analogies to evaluate AI
nodes.grounding_span: I think of it like GPS

nodes.label: Holistic systems thinking across time and context
nodes.grounding_span: we have reached a level of complexity in technology that It may be long past that point
